# Example Docs (@pagesmith/docs)

This directory is the Pagesmith monorepo’s **docs-package** example. Treat it as the reference shape for a config-driven docs site, not a Vite-app or `content.config.ts` collection example.

## Source of truth

- `pagesmith.config.json5` — site metadata, `contentDir`, `outDir`, `basePath`, `theme.layouts`, `search`, footer, `editLink`, sidebar.
- `content/` — markdown pages; each top-level folder is a nav section. Section `meta.json5` controls labels, ordering, and series.
- `theme/layouts/` — optional JSX overrides (`DocHome`, `DocPage`) using `@pagesmith/docs/jsx-runtime` and the re-exported docs shell pieces (`@pagesmith/docs/theme`, `@pagesmith/docs/components`, `@pagesmith/docs/layouts`). Shared chrome lives in `theme/layouts/shared.tsx`.
- `public/` — static assets copied through the build.

## Stack relationship

- `@pagesmith/docs` — default docs preset/theme, navigation from folders, Pagefind wiring, and frontmatter rules for docs pages.
- `@pagesmith/core` — markdown pipeline, validators, schemas, and content primitives the docs package composes.
- `@pagesmith/docs` — the only package this example imports directly. It re-exports the docs override surface while using the shared site/content stack underneath.

## Commands (published CLI)

After `npm install @pagesmith/docs`, typical invocations use the package-owned `pagesmith-docs` CLI (often via `npx`):

- `pagesmith-docs dev` — local dev with content rebuilds.
- `pagesmith-docs build` — static HTML to `outDir`; Pagefind indexes when search is enabled.
- `pagesmith-docs preview` — serve the last build output locally.
- `pagesmith-docs mcp --stdio` — run the docs MCP server on stdio for editor/agent integrations.

In this monorepo, `package.json` scripts point at the workspace CLI build with `--config ./pagesmith.config.json5`.

## Markdown regression vs guides

- `/guide/kitchen-sink` — intentional “everything at once” markdown regression page for this site's pipeline.
- `/guide/*` — explain this **docs** workflow (config, content layout, `meta.json5`, layouts, search, build/preview/MCP, core vs docs).

## Agent constraints

- Prefer reading the real `pagesmith.config.json5` and layout files here before inventing APIs (e.g. do not assume `defineDocsConfig` in this example — config is JSON5 on disk).
- When suggesting edits to example content, keep markdown showcase content concentrated in `guide/kitchen-sink.md` instead of splitting it into a separate features section.
